PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Poole, Esq., counsel for and with Michael Spencer, Petitioner (appearing separately by video conference).

The Court advises Mr. Poole as to the efficacy of filing a Petition to Determine Successor to Real Property in lieu of the current Petition. While a new case would need to be filed along with the filing fees, the Petition to Determine Successor would be far less costly and proceed much faster than a Petition to Administer Estate.

After discussion, the Court takes the current matter off calendar - with Mr. Poole's consent - with Mr. Spencer to file a new petition.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
